title: Pull Error handling: talk about search registries again, more intelligent output, cleanups
body:
<s>WIP ABSOLUTELY UNTESTED.</s>

Motivated by #907 and #908: Refactor pull error handling; instead of throwing away most errors, go to the other extreme and report all of them when searching multiple registries.

_Mostly_ this is fairly straightforward refactoring and ~simplification. The last commit, though, fairly drastically changes `resolveImage` error handling to first collect the details of all failures to pull the image, and _then_ at the end decide how to report it to the user.

**I am fairly sure the result is not good enough**, but _having that information_ at all in `resolveImage` should allow making more intelligent decisions **EDIT than trying to do the right thing deep in `pullImage` with incomplete information**.

The `resolveImage` loop body is fairly big and maybe should be split now into a separate function.

This might need at least one more step, explicitly recognizing the `localhost` case as likely-to-fail and being more silent about failures to pull it (but not other failures involving it).

See individual commits for details. This CHANGES BEHAVIOR, marked like that in the commit messages.

Feel free to reuse and/or modify all of parts of this as necessary; or tell me to throw it away.

comments.body: @mtrmac through my tired eyes this looks good.  I will give it a test run or two in the morning.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 338b23e) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 8e64ce1) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1014 has done the most important work of ensuring that errors get actually reported and not ignored; this is still an useful cleanup, and notably it restores the error notices about using short image names with an empty registry search list. ## Before ### Unqualified name, no search registries ```console $ buildah --registries-conf /dev/null from thisdoesnotexistatall 1 error occurred: * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://localhost/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: pinging docker registry returned: Get https://localhost/v2/: dial tcp [::1]:443: getsockopt: connection refused ``` ### Unqualified name, search list ```console $ buildah from $(pwd)/no-policy.json thisdoesnotexistatall 6 errors occurred: * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://localhost/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: pinging docker registry returned: Get https://localhost/v2/: dial tcp [::1]:443: getsockopt: connection refused * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.access.redhat.com/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.access.redhat.com/thisdoesnotexistatall: unknown: Not Found * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.centos.org/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.centos.org/thisdoesnotexistatall: manifest unknown: manifest unknown * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/thisdoesnotexistatall: errors: denied: requested access to the resource is denied unauthorized: authentication required * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/thisdoesnotexistatall: manifest unknown: manifest unknown * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/thisdoesnotexistatall: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" ``` ### Qualified name ```console $ buildah from example.com/thisdoesnotexistatall 1 error occurred: * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://example.com/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: pinging docker registry returned: error pinging registry example.com, response code 404 (Not Found) ``` ## After ### Unqualified name, no search registries ```console $ ./buildah --registries-conf /dev/null from thisdoesnotexistatall (image name "thisdoesnotexistatall" is a short name and no search registries are defined in /dev/null): while pulling "thisdoesnotexistatall" as "localhost/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://localhost/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: pinging docker registry returned: Get https://localhost/v2/: dial tcp [::1]:443: getsockopt: connection refused ``` ### Unqualified name, search list ```console $ ./buildah from thisdoesnotexistatall The following failures happened while trying to pull image specified by "thisdoesnotexistatall" based on search registries in /etc/containers/registries.conf: * "localhost/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://localhost/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: pinging docker registry returned: Get https://localhost/v2/: dial tcp [::1]:443: getsockopt: connection refused * "registry.fedoraproject.org/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/thisdoesnotexistatall: manifest unknown: manifest unknown * "quay.io/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/thisdoesnotexistatall: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" * "registry.access.redhat.com/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.access.redhat.com/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.access.redhat.com/thisdoesnotexistatall: unknown: Not Found * "registry.centos.org/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.centos.org/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.centos.org/thisdoesnotexistatall: manifest unknown: manifest unknown * "docker.io/library/thisdoesnotexistatall": Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/thisdoesnotexistatall: errors: denied: requested access to the resource is denied unauthorized: authentication required ``` ### Qualified name ```console $ ./buildah from example.com/thisdoesnotexistatall Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://example.com/thisdoesnotexistatall:latest: pinging docker registry returned: error pinging registry example.com, response code 404 (Not Found) ```

Late to the party on this one, but LGTM and TYVM @mtrmac, this is much nicer now.
